meta.scope: Small-batch candidate recheck after Lot 1-100 coverage
meta.note: A4 print layout files were intentionally not touched. Confirmed histories were not promoted because no new official/high-trust source established athlete identity beyond the existing candidate records.

processedAthletes.summary: Existing HPA 2011 and 2012 official PDF candidate rows remain useful, including name variants 齊藤/斎藤/齋藤. However, this run found no additional official/high-trust source confirming that those historical rows are the same athlete as 2026 Numata Lot 40. No database promotion.

sourcesChecked.label: Existing candidate source: HPA official annual result PDF 2011
sourcesChecked.result: Existing candidate row: 2011-07-17 第15回ノーギア北海道ベンチプレス選手権大会 / 男子C 66Kg級 / 齊藤 敬太 / 札幌協会 / BP best 120.0 / 2位. Same-person link to 2026 Lot 40 remains unconfirmed.

sourcesChecked.label: Existing candidate source: HPA official annual result PDF 2012
sourcesChecked.result: Existing candidate rows: 2012-04-15 春季北海道ベンチプレス選手権大会 / 男子66Kg級 / 斎藤 敬太 / BP best 135.0 / 1位, and 2012-07-15 第16回ノーギア北海道ベンチプレス選手権大会 / 男子66Kg級 / 齋藤 敬太 / BP best 142.5 / 1位. Same-person link to 2026 Lot 40 remains unconfirmed.

processedAthletes.summary: The roster/database duplicate-risk note for Lot 56 and Lot 89 remains unresolved. Exact-name and official-site searches did not return a promotable official/high-trust row for Lot 89 or a source that safely reconciles Lot 56 and Lot 89. No database merge or history reuse.

sourcesChecked.label: Existing candidate source: data/database.json roster skeleton main
sourcesChecked.result: Lot 56 and Lot 89 share Japanese name, kana, and romanized name; treated as duplicate-risk candidate, not merged.

doNotInferNotes: Existing HPA official PDF candidate rows are not treated as confirmed 2026 athlete history unless same-person identity is established from official or high-trust sources.
The Lot 56/Lot 89 北村 妙美 duplicate-risk remains unresolved; no merge, history copy, or inferred achievement was made.
No domestic, national, international/world, three-lift, or single-bench history was invented or inferred.
v5.9.6_LOCK A4 print layout was preserved.
